name: pdf-toolkit-pro
description: PDF manipulation toolkit - split, merge, compress, rotate, convert PDFs to JPG/Text. Client-side processing with privacy-first approach.
author: Luckycat133

split_pdf.description: Split PDF by visual clicks or page ranges

merge_pdf.description: Merge multiple PDF files into one

compress_pdf.description: Reduce PDF file size using basic compression

rotate_pdf.description: Rotate individual or all pages by 90/180/270 degrees

convert_pdf_to_jpg.description: Convert PDF pages to high-quality JPG images

convert_pdf_to_text.description: Extract text content from PDF documents

privacy.description: All PDF processing happens in-browser - files never leave the user's device
